694.reason: [Incorrectly uses parse_VarDef() instead of parse_FuncFParams() for parsing function formal parameters, which violates the grammar rule FuncDef → FuncType Ident '(' [FuncFParams] ')' Block]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This should be parse_FuncFParams() instead of parse_VarDef() because function parameters are defined by FuncFParams grammar rule, not VarDef. Using VarDef here will incorrectly parse function parameter lists and likely cause syntax errors or wrong structure.]
